race.description: Stradbroke Season On Sale Now C,G&E Handicap
race.comment: Competitive contest. QUICKZOU (10) is one from one over this course and distance and is yet to put in a poor one in six career outings. Will be cherry-ripe fit for this and should be right there at the business end. CODE IN TIME (1) boasts a win over this distance range, draws favourably in gate two and gets 2kg weight relief with the claim. Ticks a few boxes. DARK ARTS (3) doesn't win out of turn but is usually thereabouts and can feature if he brings his A-game. CHICAGO KING (14) resumes here but showed enough when last in work to warrant consideration in a race like this. Can play a role while fresh. CRESSBROOK (6) next in line in a race with a stack of chances.
